calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-26-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Justin Prueitt appeared by zoom for Harvey Jones and Carolyn Jones (Trustees).

The Court stated that the only issue is with the IRA and that the other four assets are categorized as trust assets. Mr. Prueitt stated that they are requesting that the IRA be distributed directly to the Trustees on the premise that it was expressed by the Trustor in the schedule of assets, the trust and also in the will. Mr. Prueitt also stated that they do not want to open a probate, that they do not want their Clients to have to incur additional costs, that the Children are the only Beneficiaries and that it is an unnecessary burden for the Beneficiaries. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition only as to the four assets.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.
